title: Image Restoration and Reconstruction Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of restoring a degraded image to its original or improved form.
relationships: The Degraded Image is analyzed by the Degradation Model to estimate the type and parameters of noise/blur
The estimated parameters inform the selection and application of a Restoration Filter/Algorithm
The algorithm produces a Reconstructed Image
The result is evaluated against the original or a quality metric, with potential feedback to refine the model or algorithm
